B. 2025 MCAHPS Format Tables 21

r_im_ﬂu1last: REVERSED: Flu shot last year

SAS Format: YND

1: NO

2: YES

r_im_pneum: REVERSED: Ever had a Pneumonia shot

SAS Format: YND

1: NO

2: YES

r_md_getmngca: REVERSED: last 6 mths, got help from personal md to manage care

SAS Format: YNC

1: NO

2: YES, SOMEWHAT

3: YES, DEFINITELY

r_mhs: REVERSED: Rate Mental Health

SAS Format: RTC

1: POOR

2: FAIR

3: GOOD

4: VERY GOOD

5: EXCELLENT

r_pd_ﬁllrx: REVERSED: Last 6 mths, Dr/pharmacy/PDP
